chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: 3172 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ اَلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ جُعِلَ ذُنُوبُهُ جِسْراً عَلَى بَابِ دَارِهِ ثُمَّ عَبَرَهَا كَمَا يُخَلِّفُ أَحَدُكُمُ اَلْجِسْرَ وَرَاءَهُ إِذَا عَبَرَهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3172 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever visits the grave of Imam Hussain ibn Ali (as) their sins will be made into a bridge at the door of their house, and they will cross over it, leaving it behind, just as one of you leaves a bridge behind after crossing it."
